In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

snippet.title: Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
♫ Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love (Lyrics)
⭐ Download/Stream: 

🎤 Lyrics: Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love

[Intro: Pitbull, Chris Brown]
Went from Mr. 305 (Dade County)
To Mr. Worldwide (All around the world, ayy, ayy)
And now we're international, so international (Oh, yeah)
International (Woo), so international

[Verse 1: Pitbull]
You can't catch me, boy (Can't catch me, boy)
I'm overseas at about a hundred G's per show
Don't test me, boy (Don't test me, boy)
'Cause I rap with the best for sure
305 'til the death of me (Yeah)
Cremate my body, let the ocean have what's left of me (Uh-huh)
But for now, forget about that
Blow the whistle, baby, you the referee, dale
[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City, I never sleep (Yeah)
Wild like Los Angeles, my fantasy (Chris Brown, woo)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Oh yeah)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Girl, it's), it's international love (International, oh-oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo!)

[Verse 2: Pitbull]
I don't play football, but I've touched down everywhere, everywhere? Everywhere (Dale)
I don't play baseball, but I've hit a home run everywhere, everywhere (Dale)
I been to countries and cities I can't pronounce and to places on the globe I ain't know existed (Yeah)
In Romania, she pulled me to the side and told me, "Pit, you can have me and my sister" (Woo)
In Lebanon, yeah, the women are bomb
And in Greece, you guessed it, the women are sweet
Been all around the world, but I ain't gon' lie
There's nothin' like Miami's heat, dale (Woo)
[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City, I never sleep (Yeah)
Wild like Los Angeles, my fantasy (Uh-huh, woo)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Woo, oh, yeah)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Girl, it's), it's international love (We're international, oh-oh, that's right)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)

[Verse 3: Pitbull]
Down in DR, they're lookin' for visas
I ain't talkin' credit cards, if you know what I mean (¿Qué lo que?)
Y en Cuba, la cosa está dura
But the women get down, if you know what I mean
En Colombia, the women got everythin' done
But they some of the most beautiful women I've ever seen
In Brazil, they're freaky with big ol' booties
And they thongs, blue, yellow, and green
En L.A., tengo la Mexicana
En New York, tengo la boricua (Dale, nena)
Besito' para toda' la' mujere' en Venezuela (Mwah)
Y en Miami, tengo a cualquiera (Woo)

[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City (Hey), I never sleep
Wild like Los Angeles (Oh-woah), my fantasy (Woo)
Hotter than Miami (You're hotter than Miami), I-I-I feel the heat
Oh-oh-oh-oh (All around the world), it's international love (International, oh-oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)
[Bridge: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
There's not a place
That your love don't affect me, baby
So don't ever change
I'll cross the globe when I'm with you, baby
Hey (Chris Brown)
Oh-woah (This for the women worldwide, that's right, woo)

[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City (Woo), I never sleep (212)
Wild like Los Angeles (L.A., L.A.), my fantasy (310)
Hotter than Miami (You're hotter than Miami), I-I-I feel the heat (305)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah, woo), it's international love (We're international, international love, that's right)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)
You put it down like (Down) New York City, I never sleep (Woo, 212)
Wild like Los Angeles (Los Angeles), my fantasy (310)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Oh, yeah, 305)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Woo, oh), it's international love (International, oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Oh-oh), it's international love (Woo)

[Outro: Chris Brown, Chris Brown & Pitbull, Pitbull]
Oh-oh-oh (You're international, so international)
Oh-oh-oh (You're international, so international)
Oh-oh-oh (You're international, so international)
Woah-woah-oh, woah-woah-oh, international love (Surrounded by beautiful girls, yeah, yeah)
Woah-woah-oh, woah-woah-oh, international love

snippet.title: "Star-Spangled Banner" - Marsh Family adaptation of the US National Anthem for 250th 4th of July Day
snippet.description:
Wishing a very happy #4thJuly to our many friends and supporters in the USA. To mark the 250th anniversary today, we've re-adapted the British popular 18th-century song "The Anacreontic Song" which became the US national anthem the #StarSpangledBanner after Francis Scott Key wrote powerful and moving words to describe the survival of a fort under bombardment during the War of 1812 (against the British). 

We've taken as our topic for the re-adaptation the current state of the United States in 2026 as seen against its majestic history, using the metaphor of a ship sailing. Lyrics below, with nods to some of the great speeches and moments in American history, and with hopes that the current distortion of its values and direction will not endure, but be another storm to pass through. 

Downloadable as a track: https://themarshfamily.bandcamp.com/track/star-spangled-banner ❤️🇺🇸🎶

___________________________ 

Order our new album "Hollow Chapters" (came out 27 March): 
DIGITAL: https://orcd.co/hollowchapters 
PHYSICAL: CDs or LPs: https://themarshfamily.bandcamp.com/album/hollow-chapters

___________________________ 

Support us here: 
- PayPal to leave us a tip jar: https://paypal.me/marshfamilysongs 
- Patreon for ongoing support & bonuses: https://www.patreon.com/marshfamilysongs 

Find our other channels here: https://linktr.ee/marshfamilysongs 

Follow us here: 
- https://www.marshfamilysongs.com 
- https://www.facebook.com/MarshFamilySongs/ 
- https://www.instagram.com/marshfamilysongs/ 
- https://twitter.com/MarshSongs 
- https://www.threads.net/@marshfamilysongs 
- https://www.tiktok.com/@marshfamilysongs 
- https://bsky.app/profile/marshfamilysongs.bsky.social 
- https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AYmbCwi92V29y69lkRkRa 

___________________________ 

LYRICS

O say, can you see, through the dusk’s ebbing light
What so proudly once sailed on a tide fit for dreaming?
Whose design from her start, bearing freedom and right
O’er the dark waves seems lost, in the storm’s ghastly screaming
And the rocks rip and tear, the old timbers impaired
Ne’er proofed ‘gainst the might that the kraken could bear
O say does that star-spangled banner yet wave?
O’er the land of the free and the home of the brave

From the shore dimly seen over history’s deep,
Linger ancestral ghosts who had bled for each passage
For twelve score and ten years, o’er the towering steep
Out of slavery’s throes, every era less savage
Now the shipwreck falls hard, but atop, torn and scarred
‘Cross the violent vast sea flutters life, liberty: 
O say does that star-spangled banner yet wave?
O’er the land of the free and the home of the brave

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.description:

2nd & 3rd STAGE (11 episodes total)Coming to Netflix from September 25, 2026New episodes streaming every Friday, worldwide exclusively on Netflix!

【INTRODUCTION】 
総距離約750マイルの砂漠越え――
ジョニィ・ジョースターとジャイロ・ツェペリが挑むその砂漠には“悪魔の手のひら”と恐れられる土地が存在した。
さらに、不穏な事件が巻き起こり、このレースがただの競技大会ではないことを思い知らされる。
ふたりは様々な思惑が交錯する2nd STAGEへ立ち向かう。
A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles-
the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

felonious gru, typically referred to by his surname gru, is a fictional character and the protagonist of illumination's despicable me franchise. he first appeared in despicable me and has appeared in all seven films in the franchise. he is voiced by american actor steve carell. based on a dracula-like concept character pitched by animator sergio pablos, he was shaped by directors chris renaud and pierre coffin into a character more like a james bond villain.

gru is a grouchy, quick-witted, and cynical supervillain and the boss of the minions, who also serves as a secret agent in order to fight other supervillains. his adoption of three orphan girls named margo, edith and agnes propels his story arc from malevolent supervillain to reformed parent.

bowser, sometimes known as king koopa or king bowser, is the main antagonist of the mario franchise. he is a large, powerful, fire-breathing koopa who leads the koopa troop, an evil kingdom of turtle-like creatures, and has been the arch-nemesis of mario since his debut in super mario bros created by nintendo. he has repeatedly kidnapped or attempted to kidnap princess peach with the ultimate goal of defeating mario and taking over the mushroom kingdom. he has also attempted to conquer other lands, such as the mushroom world, dinosaur land and many more. now bowser is in a rap battle against gru.

snippet.title: ARK Tides of Fortune & Dragontopia Trailer
snippet.description:
Set sail, take flight, and step into two massive new ARK adventures: ARK Tides of Fortune and ARK: Dragontopia, each bringing a distinct new frontier of survival, exploration, creatures, combat, and progression to the ARK universe.

ARK Tides of Fortune

Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob - played by Karl Urban - but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune!

The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in explosive naval combat. The new weapons, structures, cosmetics, and exotic creatures included in Tides of Fortune can be unleashed across the ARK universe, but the deep physics-driven waters of Genesis are where this swashbuckling arsenal truly comes alive. 

ARK Tides of Fortune - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558480/ARK_Tides_of_Fortune/

ARK Tides of Fortune - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-tides-of-fortune/9NW717HPJDK9

ARK Tides of Fortune - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-TIDESOFFORTUNE01


ARK: Dragontopia

Tame the legends and rule the skies!

Awaken within a cloudbound paradise where the earth has fractured into a world of floating islands, and myths take flight. High above these magical grounds, Survivors must learn a new rhythm of survival alongside the true rulers of the sky: dragons. Across a vast aerial ecosystem, ARK: Dragontopia invites you to step off the edge and master the skies. Guided by the echoes of a lost order of dragonriders, you’ll enter a land where legends breathe anew. As a fierce new threat claims the horizon, it is up to you to restore balance!

LORDS OF THE SKY
Between the sun and moon, the skies teem with draconic legends. Encounter titanic behemoths that devour resources and enemies alike, elegant wind-dancing steeds that gallop across the clouds, deadly four-winged assassins, multi-headed beasts of dual-breathed chaos, and loyal shoulder-drakes that guard you on your journey. Every dragon demands its own path to taming, requiring you to observe, learn, and master their unique rhythms before they ever let you take the saddle.

THE DRAGONTOPIA ECOSYSTEM
To survive this high-altitude frontier, you’ll need to grow through the Dragon Skill Trees, a new progression system built around strengthening your bond with these mythical beasts. Craft specialized gear, wield potent tools, and expand your base with a draconic tileset, incubator backpacks, and mysterious potion stations. But these skies are contested, and you are the realm’s last hope to break the vanguard of a ruthless airborne invader!
The dragons are waking, the islands are calling, and the Skies of Dragontopia are yours to claim!

Dragonntopia - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558490/ARK_Dragontopia/

Dragonntopia - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-dragontopia/9NB7PMZ290KX/0010

Dragonntopia - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-DRAGONTOPIADLC01
